title: Fig. 1 in Infestation With Ixodes Ricinus Ticks On Migrating Passerine Birds In Lithuania And Norway
author: Paulauskas, Algimantas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 1 Molecular taxonomical identification of the I. ricinus by PCR assay. Lines 1 and 15 – 50 bp marker; Line 2 –negative control; Lines 2-13 –positive results: amplified 150 bp specific fragment for I. ricinus; Line 14 – positive control of I. ricinus (150 bp)
